{{Infobox character
| name = Edina
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Edina]] is [[Simon's mother]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Edina]] is married to [[Kalman]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Edina]] turned insane.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
